_meta.layer: Core Thesis Factory v1 — Single-Name Decision Sheet (单票决策书)
_meta.disclaimer: INTERNAL, UNVALIDATED research output of the model-recommendation pilot — not validated alpha, not external/personalized investment advice; sizing fields are research posture only; human executes. Quality gate = human red-team (auto checks are the floor only).

sector_theme.zh: AI 服务器 / rack-scale ODM · forward-PE 被盈利压缩
sector_theme.en: AI server / rack-scale ODM · forward multiple compressed by earnings

ticker_one_context.objective_horizon: 6-12 months (AI value-chain screen #82 → deep thesis #85, corrected per PR-G #86)
ticker_one_context.real_money_consideration: WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE — no position at current price; R/R ~1.7 below the 2:1 bar

provenance.research_core_lineage: Discovered in the AI value-chain discovery screen (#82, constructive WATCH) → deep thesis #85, CORRECTED per PR-G #86 一手财务对账门 (#86 merged to main 4a1fd60). This core encodes the post-#86 primary-verified thesis for forward-checkpoint registration.
provenance.generation_note: Load-bearing numbers reconciled against the FILED cninfo PDFs by PR-G #86 (not second-hand): Q1'26 归母 105.95亿 E1-confirmed (cninfo 1225231598.PDF; the circulating 41.8亿 was a stale prior-year figure, discarded); FY2025 归母 352.86亿 E1 (cninfo 1225004420.PDF) — confirms the FY26 500-606亿 = +42-72% growth framing; 总股本 198.44亿 E1. Committed reference price = universe_a 2026-06-12 snapshot 70.57 (committed PE 33.04, mcap 14004亿).
provenance.red_team_record: owner-authorized red-team floor, scorer = Junyan, basis = owner-authorized floor / post-#86 verified, average 87.2 PASS (具体性88/可证伪92/估值纪律84/信息增量86/风险86). NOT an agent/self score.

variant_perception.zh: 市场信:工业富联是 AI 服务器王(全球 #1 AI 服务器 ODM,>40% 份额),北美云 capex + GB200/GB300 rack-scale 让出货爆发,故事已是全市场共识,市值已超 1.4 万亿——默认充分定价。我们信:变体不在'AI 服务器有没有需求'(那是真的、已在 tape:Q1 营收 2510.78亿 +56.5%、归母 105.95亿 +102.55%),而在 **forward multiple 被盈利压缩** —— committed PE 仅 33×,若 FY26 归母落在 500-606亿(对 FY25 已核实的 352.86亿 = +42~72% 增长),forward PE 降到约 23-28×,是当前 AI 硬件链里少数'故事很热但倍数仍可讨论'的超大市值名。但 ODM 净利率天生薄(~3-4%),所以真正的承重变量是:GB200→GB300 rack-scale 的价值量/复杂度能不能让分部毛利率/净利率结构性上一个台阶 —— 如果只是放量不改 margin,它只是高 beta 低 margin 供应商;若 margin 上行,才有持续 re-rating。一句话:好公司、价格也还能讨论,但当前 R/R 约 1.72 不到 2:1,不是买入。
variant_perception.en: Market believes: Foxconn Industrial Internet is the AI-server king (global #1 AI-server ODM, >40% share); NA-cloud capex + GB200/GB300 rack-scale make shipments explode; the story is full consensus at a >¥1.4T cap — assumed fully priced. We believe: the variant is NOT 'is there AI-server demand' (there is, and it is already in the tape: Q1 revenue ¥2,510.78亿 +56.5%, 归母 ¥105.95亿 +102.55%), it is **the forward multiple being compressed by earnings** — committed PE is only 33x, and if FY26 归母 lands at ¥500-606亿 (= +42~72% off the E1-verified FY25 ¥352.86亿) forward PE falls to ~23-28x, one of the few mega-caps in the AI-hardware chain where 'hot story but a still-discussable multiple' holds. BUT ODM net margin is structurally thin (~3-4%), so the load-bearing variable is whether GB200→GB300 rack-scale value/complexity lifts segment gross/net margin STRUCTURALLY — if it is volume-only with no margin step-up, it is just a high-beta low-margin supplier; only a margin step-up earns sustained re-rating. In one line: a good company at a still-discussable price, but at R/R ~1.72 (below 2:1) it is NOT a buy.

mechanism.zh: 第一性链条:AI 算力 capex(北美云 capex 上行 + GB200/GB300 量产)→ rack-scale AI 服务器整机/机柜需求 → 工业富联作为全球 #1 AI 服务器 ODM 承接(规模 + 客户认证 + 供应链复杂度护城河)→ 收入放量(已兑现)→ 若机柜 ASP/价值量/复杂度抬升分部毛利率,则归母增速 + 倍数双升;反之 margin 不动则只是放量。诚实锚:本论点不依赖任何未披露的订单数字,只依赖 2026 半年报强制披露的 归母 run-rate(年化是否 ≥450亿)与 云计算/AI 服务器分部毛利率(是否 ≥6% 且有结构改善)—— 这两个数可逐期证伪'高增长是不是有利润质量'。
mechanism.en: First-principles chain: AI compute capex (NA-cloud capex up + GB200/GB300 ramp) → rack-scale AI-server / rack demand → Foxconn Industrial Internet absorbs it as the global #1 AI-server ODM (scale + customer qualification + supply-chain-complexity moat) → revenue ramp (already realized) → IF rack ASP/value/complexity lifts segment GM, then both 归母 growth AND multiple re-rate; otherwise it is volume-only. Honesty anchor: this thesis relies on NO undisclosed order number — only on the H1-mandatory prints of the 归母 run-rate (does it annualize ≥¥450亿) and the cloud/AI-server segment gross margin (≥6% with structural improvement) — both falsify, quarter by quarter, whether the high growth carries profit quality.

thesis.horizon: 6-12 months (E1 proof = the Q1-run-rate continuation + segment-GM print at the 2026 H1 report ~2026-08-30)
thesis.conviction: WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE — thesis and price are both discussable (the rare such name in the AI chain), but at the committed reference price the R/R is ~1.72, BELOW the 2:1 bar. No position. STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (owner research trigger ≤~60, or the composer 2:1 bar ≤~68.67) OR on a post-H1 margin/run-rate re-band. NOT a buy.

items.claim: Q1'26 (filed): 营收 2510.78亿 (+56.52%), 归母 105.95亿 (+102.55%), 扣非 102.50亿 (+109.05%), 经营现金流 250.24亿, EPS 0.53, 总股本 198.44亿 — the AI-server revenue+profit inflection is already in the tape, NOT hoped-for
items.source: PR-G #86 reconciled vs filed cninfo 1225231598.PDF (2026-04-29 一季报); the circulating ¥41.8亿 was a stale prior-year figure, discarded

items.claim: FY2025 (filed): 归母 352.86亿 (+51.99%), 营收 9028.87亿 — the verified base; it CONFIRMS FY26 consensus 500-606亿 = +42~72% growth (sound, not heroic). The '302亿' that circulated upstream was wrong and never used in this thesis
items.source: PR-G #86 reconciled vs filed cninfo 1225004420.PDF (2026-03-11 年报)

items.claim: Forward multiple compressed by earnings, not by expansion: committed PE 33.04 (mcap 14004亿 ÷ TTM ~406-424亿); FY26 consensus 归母 500亿 (天风) – 606亿 (高盛) ⇒ forward PE ~23-28x — the lowest mega-cap forward multiple in the AI-hardware chain; GS target ¥92.9-93.9
items.source: exchange feed (committed price/PE, E1) + 天风/高盛 FY26 consensus (E2 sell-side, finance.sina 2026-04-22)

items.claim: Global #1 AI-server ODM, >40% global AI-server share, deep-bound to NVIDIA GB200/GB300 racks + NA hyperscalers (MSFT/GOOG/AMZN) — the closest 'picks-and-shovels toll' in the AI-server layer
items.source: sell-side / media (E2); not a filing-disclosed split

items.claim: The decisive UNCERTAINTY is margin, not revenue: ODM net margin is structurally thin (~3-4%). The bull case requires the GB200→GB300 rack-scale value/complexity to lift segment GM structurally; if revenue scales without margin, the 1.4万亿 cap is a high-beta low-margin supplier
items.source: ODM economics (structural) + the H1 segment-GM print is the resolving disclosure

rule_x_check.why: The load-bearing leg (whether the high growth carries profit quality = 归母 run-rate + segment GM) is re-confirmable by MANDATORY 2026 H1 disclosure (合并利润表 + 分部毛利率). The thesis relies on NO undisclosed order number. Satisfies the 2026-05-17 Rule-X boundary: same forward mechanism, issuer-disclosure-confirmable.

evidence.contrarian_view: BULLS: AI capex is a multi-year super-cycle, GB200→GB300 rack content/ASP keeps rising, a global #1 ODM with NVIDIA+cloud binding deserves a scarcity multiple, so forward 23-28x is 'cheap on FY26'. BEARS (the discipline at price): (1) ODM net margin is structurally thin (~3-4%) and historically does NOT scale with volume — revenue can explode while margin caps the multiple; (2) at a ¥1.4万亿 consensus mega-cap that ran ~+200% YoY, the 'cheap forward PE' is real ONLY if FY26 归母 actually lands at 500-606亿 — a miss double-kills via E and multiple; (3) the variant ('forward PE cheap because earnings compound in') is a valuation-timing observation on a widely-covered name, not a deep non-consensus structural edge; (4) R/R at 70.57 is ~1.72, below 2:1 — the entry math is broken until a pullback (≤~60) or an H1 margin proof re-bands.

event.zh: 2026 半年报(Q1 run-rate 是否延续 + 云/AI 服务器分部毛利率 = E1 证明事件)
event.en: 2026 H1 report (does the Q1 run-rate continue + cloud/AI-server segment GM = the E1 proof event)

catalyst_calendar.watch: H1 归母(年化是否 ≥450亿)、分部毛利率(是否 ≥6% 且结构改善)、扣非
catalyst_calendar.expected: H1 归母 annualized ≥450亿 & segment GM ≥6% with improvement supports the margin-step-up thesis; the inverse fires wrong_if
rack-scale value-content step-up is the bull-case driver; CROWDING-flagged headline, not load-bearing on its own

event.zh: 北美云资本开支指引(季度)

catalyst_calendar.expected: supportive capex sustains demand; a capex pause is the macro risk

triggers.source: 2026 半年报 合并利润表

triggers.metric: 云计算/AI 服务器分部毛利率
营收增但净利率不改善 (revenue beats, net margin flat/down)

note.zh: 三条全部绑半年报强制披露(归母/分部毛利/净利率),公司无法不披露;任一触发即弃,触发后未更新决策书记为诚实性失败。承重变量是 MARGIN 不是营收。
note.en: All three bind to MANDATORY H1 line items (归母 / segment GM / net margin) — the company cannot withhold them; any trigger kills the thesis; an un-updated sheet after a trigger is an honesty failure. The load-bearing variable is MARGIN, not revenue.

valuation_target_range.basis: FY2026 earnings bridge (FY26 归母 × forward PE ÷ 198.44亿 股本, E1). FY25 base 352.86亿 E1-verified per PR-G #86. Forward PE is [unvalidated intuition] with anchors (committed PE 33; GS target ¥92.9-93.9). The thesis-loaded variable is ODM net MARGIN, which resolves at the H1 segment-GM print.

assumptions: FY26 归母 420亿(ODM margin 维持薄、H1 run-rate 年化 < 450亿)
市场去线性外推,forward PE 22-25× [unvalidated intuition]
FY26 归母 520亿(Q1 run-rate 部分延续、AI rack mix 改善但不剧烈)
forward PE 25-30× [unvalidated intuition;增速确认无加速]
FY26 归母 620亿(GB300 rack-scale 复杂度抬 margin + 市场给稀缺溢价)

valuation_target_range.sensitivity_note: 熊/基/牛 mid ≈ 50 / 72 / 106;R/R @ committed 70.57 = (106-70.57)/(70.57-50) ≈ 1.72(< 2:1);2:1 满足价 ≈ ¥68.67(composer bar),owner 研究触发价更保守 ≤¥60。承重变量是 ODM 净利率,H1 分部披露解析。

summary.zh: WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE,当前价不入场。按 committed 70.57,R/R ≈ 1.72(牛 mid 106 / 熊 mid 50),低于 2:1——它是当前 AI 链里少数 thesis 和价格都还能讨论的票,但不是买入名单。两条重新进入路径:(a) 价格回到 ≤~60(owner 研究触发价,更保守;composer 2:1 满足价 ≈68.67);(b) 2026 半年报证明利润率/利润 run-rate(H1 归母年化 ≥450亿 + 分部毛利率结构改善)后用打印数字重算估值带,使更高价也能满足 2:1。承重变量是 MARGIN 不是营收。任何执行前取实时价重算;human_executes——系统只建议、不下单。
summary.en: WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE, no entry at current price. At committed 70.57, R/R ≈ 1.72 (bull mid 106 / bear mid 50), below 2:1 — it is one of the few AI-chain names where thesis and price are both discussable, but it is NOT a buy list. Two re-entry paths: (a) pullback to ≤~60 (owner research trigger, more conservative; composer 2:1 price ≈68.67); (b) a post-H1 margin/run-rate proof (H1 归母 annualized ≥450亿 + segment-GM structural improvement) re-bands the bridge so the bar is met at a higher price. The load-bearing variable is MARGIN, not revenue. Pull a live quote before any execution; human_executes — the system suggests, never trades.

execution_plan.entry: committed reference 70.57 (universe_a 2026-06-12 snapshot); NO entry at current — add zone = ≤~60 (owner research trigger) / composer 2:1 bar ≤~68.67, OR a post-H1 margin re-band
execution_plan.staging: WATCH now (no position) → STARTER only inside the add zone or after the H1 margin re-band → conviction requires R/R ≥2:1 on the re-based band; never average into a fired wrong_if
execution_plan.invalidation: price: n/a while flat (no position); thesis: any mechanized wrong_if trigger (H1 run-rate < 450亿 / segment GM < 6% / margin-not-improving) kills the thesis
execution_plan.sizing_suggestion: tier: NONE at reference (WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE); STARTER_CAPPED inside the add zone [research posture only — human_executes; the system never auto-trades or sizes]
execution_plan.holding_horizon: 6-12 months from first entry (if ever); the thesis resolves at the 2026-08 H1 print (run-rate + segment GM) and quarterly thereafter
review_dates: 2026-07-15 (30d: pre-H1 positioning + 北美云 capex 信号)

serenity.theme_system_change: A股 AI 半导体/算力(Scan #1 #68 邻接):AI 算力 capex 政策性+周期性放大 × 北美云 capex 上行 × GB200/GB300 rack-scale 把 AI 服务器从普通服务器升级为高价值量机柜 —— 工业富联是把这一需求变现的全球 #1 ODM toll-taker
value_chain_map: L9 算力芯片(NVIDIA/ASIC,真瓶颈但非本票)
L-server AI 服务器/rack ODM(本票:工业富联,全球#1,toll-taker)
L-comp 连接/散热/高速PCB(GB 机柜含量件)
L-cloud 北美超大规模云(需求侧)
serenity.scarce_layer: 本票不在稀缺层:ODM/整机组装的护城河是规模+客户认证+供应链复杂度,不是瓶颈级 IP;真正稀缺的是上游算力芯片(L9),工业富联是 SUPPLIES 不是 CONTROLS
serenity.company_role: SUPPLIES (AI-server/rack ODM toll-taker — does NOT control the silicon bottleneck)

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 全球 #1 AI 服务器 ODM,>40% 全球 AI 服务器份额,deep-bound NVIDIA GB200/GB300 + 北美云
Q1'26 营收 2510.78亿 +56.5% 由 AI 服务器驱动(收入放量已兑现 = 需求侧真实)
Q1 经营现金流 250.24亿 = 真现金、非纸面利润

serenity.market_may_be_missing: 诚实结论:市场没漏多少——1.4万亿、共识 AI 服务器王、覆盖极充分。真正的边际只是'committed PE 33、forward 23-28x 在 AI 硬件链里相对便宜'这个估值时点观察 + 'margin 能否随 GB300 rack-scale 上台阶'这个尚未证明的变量。信息增量是中等的(这是 owner 红队五轴里最'宽'的一档),不是深度非共识变体
serenity.substitution_route: 浪潮/纬创/广达等 ODM 同业可替代,ODM 是可竞争层(margin 易被压);工业富联护城河=规模+NVIDIA/云绑定,非不可逾越——这也是 margin 不一定能上台阶的根因
serenity.expansion_difficulty: ODM 产能可扩(非硬瓶颈);约束在 margin 不在产能——放量容易,提毛利难
serenity.customer_validation: NVIDIA GB200/GB300 rack + 北美超大规模云(MSFT/GOOG/AMZN)= 顶级客户验证(E2);Q1 营收 +56.5% 是该验证的财务印证(E1)

what_weakens_the_view.source: 2026 半年报 合并利润表

what_weakens_the_view.metric: 云/AI 服务器分部毛利率

risk.fundamental: ODM 净利率结构性薄(~3-4%),放量不一定带来 margin;若 GB300 rack-scale 不抬毛利,只是高 beta 低 margin 供应商;Q1 +102% 高增的可持续性押在 margin 上
risk.policy: AI 算力 capex 强周期,北美云 capex 上行是顺风、放缓会反噬;地缘/出口管制波及 AI 服务器供应链与客户节奏
risk.valuation: 1.4万亿共识大票;forward PE 23-28x '便宜'仅当 FY26 归母 500-606亿 兑现;任何 margin/run-rate miss → E 下修 + 倍数去主题化双杀;bear 47-53 即该情形的诚实下界
risk.liquidity: 超大市值、流动性充裕;但主题资金 + 共识多头主导边际定价,情绪降温时双向波动
risk.crowding_reflexivity: 近一年 ~+200%(¥18→~¥53,Apr-May'26 多次涨停),共识极拥挤、动量延展;唯一不 AVOID 的理由 = forward 倍数在板块里最便宜(盈利在涨进价里);sentiment feeds 仍 stubbed [data break]

disclaimers.pilot: internal model-recommendation pilot output — NOT validated alpha, NOT external/personalized advice; registered as an owner-authorized (scorer: Junyan) red-team-floor WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE forward-checkpoint case, never a buy signal
data_breaks_logged: committed reference price = universe_a 2026-06-12 snapshot 70.57; pull a live quote before any execution
FY26 归母 500-606亿 is E2 sell-side consensus (a forecast by design), not E1; the forward-PE valuation rests on it
AI-server >40% share is E2 (not a filing-disclosed segment split)
automated valuation stack (rDCF/EV-EBITDA/RI) not run for this name — band is analyst-constructed, every multiple [unvalidated intuition] with stated anchors
segment-level cloud/AI-server gross margin is the load-bearing unknown and is not separately disclosed pre-H1 — tracked via the H1 分部信息 print
sentiment feeds stubbed (crowding monitoring partially blind; proxied by 行情/外资评级)

last_price.note: latest COMMITTED price — staleness is flagged, never papered over

valuation_stack_status.note: automated valuation generators' status — breaks logged honestly
